name: James Cook University
tagline: Dive into discovery on the reef's edge
tagline_reasoning: This tagline captures JCU's unique proximity to the Great Barrier Reef, appealing to students interested in marine biology and environmental sciences with a sense of adventure and exploration.
tags: Only uni in the world located next to two World Heritage sites
student_quote: Studying Marine Biology here at JCU is unreal! You literally get to do research on the Great Barrier Reef, and the community is super supportive and close-knit.

nearby_venues.name: Jam Corner
nearby_venues.student_review: Best study spot on campus -- strong flat whites and power outlets everywhere.

nearby_venues.name: The Coffee Club Douglas
nearby_venues.student_review: Reliable brekkie before an 8am lecture. The big-brekkie wrap is a lifesaver.

nearby_venues.name: Donna Thai
nearby_venues.student_review: Cheapest pad thai in Townsville and massive portions. Student budget approved.

nearby_venues.name: Brewery Townsville
nearby_venues.student_review: Friday arvo beers with the cohort. Live music some weekends too.

nearby_venues.name: Palmer Street Food Precinct
nearby_venues.student_review: A whole strip of restaurants -- we always end up here after exams.

day_in_life.description: Start the day with a refreshing jog along The Strand, enjoying the ocean breeze and stunning sunrise over Magnetic Island.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Joggers on The Strand beach at sunrise, ocean view, Magnetic Island in background, palm trees swaying

day_in_life.activity: Lecture at Eddie Koiki Mabo Library
day_in_life.description: Head to the Eddie Koiki Mabo Library for a Marine Biology lecture, taking notes in the light-filled study spaces.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Students taking notes in Eddie Koiki Mabo Library, bright interior, bookshelves, laptops open, tropical plants indoors

day_in_life.description: Grab a flat white and catch up with mates at Juliette's on Flinders Street, a favourite student hangout.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Friends chatting at Juliette's cafe, Flinders Street, busy urban setting, coffee cups, laughter

day_in_life.description: Join a research trip to the Great Barrier Reef, marvelling at the vibrant corals and diverse marine life.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Students snorkeling in Great Barrier Reef, colourful corals, tropical fish, crystal clear water, underwater research

day_in_life.description: Discuss environmental science projects with classmates on the grassy Campus Green, surrounded by tropical flora and fauna.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Students sitting on Campus Green, notebooks and laptops, tropical plants and trees, relaxed atmosphere

day_in_life.description: Enjoy a seafood dinner at The Watermark, sharing stories from the day while overlooking the marina's twinkling lights.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Seafood dinner at The Watermark, waterfront view, marina lights, friends laughing, elegant presentation

day_in_life.description: Drive up to Castle Hill for an evening of stargazing, spotting constellations in the clear tropical night sky.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Group stargazing at Castle Hill, vast night sky, visible constellations, Townsville lights below, sense of wonder

cost.tuition_comparison: Lowest of the five -- regional pricing advantage
cost.rent_comparison: Cheapest of the five -- regional advantage

name: Griffith University Gold Coast
tagline_reasoning: This tagline captures the essence of Griffith University Gold Coast’s location near iconic beaches, its academic rhythm with the trimester system, and its emphasis on innovation and entrepreneurship, all in a playful and memorable style.
tags: Campus minutes from Surfers Paradise beaches
student_quote: Studying here is like balancing on a surfboard—there's always something happening, whether it's on the beach or with the latest tech startup. It's the perfect mix of work and play.

nearby_venues.name: Barefoot Barista
nearby_venues.student_review: Walk in from the beach, sandy feet welcome. Best iced coffee on the coast.

nearby_venues.name: Burleigh Pavilion
nearby_venues.student_review: Sunset sessions on the rooftop -- feels like a holiday even during semester.

nearby_venues.name: The Collective Palm Beach
nearby_venues.student_review: Acai bowls and good vibes. The outdoor seating is perfect for group study.

nearby_venues.name: BSKT Cafe
nearby_venues.student_review: Healthy eats and the smoothies are unreal. A bit pricey but worth it.

nearby_venues.name: Gemelli Italian
nearby_venues.student_review: Proper Italian. We save it for end-of-semester celebrations.

day_in_life.description: Catch some early morning waves at Surfers Paradise Beach, just a short drive from campus. Perfect way to kickstart the day!
day_in_life.photo_prompt: sunrise surfing at Surfers Paradise Beach, vibrant waves, golden light, energetic students

day_in_life.description: Grab an avo toast and flat white at G's Cafe on campus. It's a student favourite and a great spot to meet up with friends.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students enjoying breakfast at G's Cafe, avocado toast, coffee cups, friendly atmosphere, campus vibes

day_in_life.description: Dive into a hands-on marine science lab at Griffith’s Advanced Design and Prototyping Technologies Institute. Investigate local marine life and ecosystems.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students in a marine science lab, examining aquatic specimens, modern equipment, focused learning

day_in_life.description: Hit up the Nathan campus library for a study sesh. The quiet floors are perfect for cramming or group projects.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students studying in Griffith University library, books, laptops, collaborative atmosphere, modern interior

day_in_life.description: Squeeze in a workout at the uni’s fitness centre. It’s got top-notch equipment, perfect for blowing off steam between classes.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students working out at Griffith University gym, fitness equipment, energetic mood, diverse students

day_in_life.description: Head to Market Square in Varsity Lakes for some Asian street food. It's a popular spot for students to unwind and fuel up.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students dining at Market Square, vibrant food stalls, diverse dishes, lively evening atmosphere

day_in_life.description: Stroll down Burleigh Heads Beach, enjoying the stunning sunset views. It's a relaxing way to end a busy uni day.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students walking on Burleigh Heads Beach at sunset, colourful sky, peaceful ocean, serene students

cost.tuition_comparison: Below average -- competitive Gold Coast rates

name: University of Queensland
tagline: Sandstone spirit, riverside innovation, explore more
tagline_reasoning: This tagline captures UQ's historic campus vibe, scenic riverside location, and its reputation for cutting-edge research and diverse opportunities, appealing to adventurous students.
student_quote: Walking through the Great Court feels like stepping into a historical movie set, but the real action is all the late-night brainstorming sessions at the lakeside. UQ is where you'll find your tribe, no matter your passion.

nearby_venues.name: Merlo Coffee (UQ Lakes)
nearby_venues.student_review: On-campus perfection. Grab a long black and sit by the lakes between lectures.

nearby_venues.name: Cafe Sari
nearby_venues.student_review: Malaysian laksa that tastes like home. Massive serves for under fifteen bucks.

nearby_venues.name: The Plough Inn
nearby_venues.student_review: Historic pub right on the river. Trivia nights are legendary.

nearby_venues.name: Grill'd St Lucia
nearby_venues.student_review: Reliable burgers when you need comfort food during assignment season.

nearby_venues.name: Cheeky Poke Bar
nearby_venues.student_review: Fresh poke bowls and quick service -- perfect lunch between tutorials.

day_in_life.description: Start the day paddling on the Brisbane River with the UQ Kayak Club, enjoying stunning views of the St Lucia campus.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Students kayaking at sunrise, Brisbane River, lush greenery, St Lucia campus in background, vibrant sky

day_in_life.description: Grab a flat white from Merlo Coffee inside the Duhig Building to kickstart your brain for the day ahead.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Barista pouring a flat white at Merlo Coffee, cozy cafe atmosphere, students chatting, books on tables

day_in_life.description: Engage in an interactive lecture at the state-of-the-art GCI building, learning about renewable energy systems.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: UQ GCI building, students in lecture hall, professor explaining, renewable energy diagrams on screen

day_in_life.description: Enjoy a healthy poke bowl from Playa Bowls at the St. Lucia Village, a popular hangout spot for UQ students.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: Colourful poke bowl, fresh ingredients, students sitting outside Playa Bowls, vibrant atmosphere

day_in_life.description: Find a spot under the shade of the Great Court's iconic sandstone arches to review notes for upcoming exams.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: UQ Great Court, students studying under sandstone arches, green lawns, sunlit scene

day_in_life.description: Join the Environmental Management Society for a chill catch-up and some wildlife spotting around UQ Lakes.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: UQ Lakes at sunset, students gathered, wildlife in view, relaxed and social atmosphere

day_in_life.description: Catch the CityCat to The Regatta Hotel for a classic Aussie pub dinner with mates overlooking the river.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: The Regatta Hotel, lively dinner scene, friends laughing, Brisbane River view, warm lighting

name: UNSW Sydney
tagline: Code, create, conquer by the coast.
tagline_reasoning: This tagline encapsulates UNSW Sydney's strong emphasis on engineering and innovation (code, create), while highlighting its vibrant coastal location and ambitious student environment (conquer by the coast).
tags: Located in Kensington, close to Sydney CBD and beaches
student_quote: UNSW is like a melting pot of cultures and ideas, with so many opportunities to connect with industry right at our doorstep. Plus, being just a quick bus ride from the beach is a total game-changer.

nearby_venues.name: Taste of Shanghai Kingsford
nearby_venues.student_review: Best xiao long bao near campus. Always packed at lunch -- worth the wait.

nearby_venues.name: Mamak
nearby_venues.student_review: Roti canai at midnight after a library session. Sydney institution.

nearby_venues.name: Three Blue Ducks Rosebery
nearby_venues.student_review: Fancy brunch spot for when parents visit. The corn fritters are elite.

nearby_venues.name: The Doncaster
nearby_venues.student_review: The local pub. Cheap jugs on Thursdays and pool tables. Classic uni bar.

nearby_venues.name: Little L Thai
nearby_venues.student_review: Ten-dollar pad see ew that actually fills you up. Student essential.

day_in_life.description: Catch some waves at Bondi Beach before classes. It's an energising way to start the day and popular among students.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: student surfing at sunrise, Bondi Beach waves, golden sunlight, surfers in background, vibrant ocean

day_in_life.description: Grab a flat white at Penny Lane on campus. It's the go-to spot for a quick caffeine fix before lectures.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students at Penny Lane cafe, holding coffee cups, UNSW campus, modern interior, morning sunlight through windows

day_in_life.description: Head to Clancy Auditorium for a stimulating guest lecture in AI. It's an opportunity to learn from industry leaders.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students in Clancy Auditorium, listening to lecturer, dynamic presentation slide, attentive audience

day_in_life.description: Chill out with friends over burgers and chips at The White House. It's the best spot for a hearty lunch on campus.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students eating at The White House, casual setting, burgers and fries, outdoor seating, laughter

day_in_life.description: Hit up UNSW Library for some quiet study. The views from the upper floors are perfect for a productive afternoon.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students studying in UNSW Library, books and laptops, panoramic window view, focused atmosphere

day_in_life.description: Unwind with a jog around Centennial Park. The lush greenery and open spaces offer a refreshing escape from studies.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: student jogging in Centennial Park, sunset hues, tree-lined pathways, serene natural setting

day_in_life.description: Venture to Newtown for some tasty Thai food with mates. King Street is buzzing with life and flavours from all over.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: students dining in Newtown, vibrant street atmosphere, Thai restaurant, bustling evening, diverse crowd

cost.tuition_comparison: Above average -- premium Go8 research uni

name: University of Melbourne
tagline: Brains meet baristas in Melbourne's cultural heart.
tagline_reasoning: This tagline highlights the university's top-notch academic reputation alongside Melbourne's vibrant, coffee-loving cultural scene, creating a blend of intellect and lifestyle that's uniquely Melbourne.
student_quote: Studying here is like being at the heart of Melbourne's culture, with a mix of intense academia and a vibrant social scene. I love grabbing a coffee in a laneway before diving into research.

nearby_venues.name: Lune Croissanterie
nearby_venues.student_review: The best croissant in Australia, no debate. Treat yourself after exams.

nearby_venues.name: Heartattack and Vine
nearby_venues.student_review: Wine bar with student-friendly prices. Cosy vibes and a great cheese board.

nearby_venues.name: Pellegrini's Espresso Bar
nearby_venues.student_review: Old-school Italian espresso since 1954. A Melbourne rite of passage.

nearby_venues.name: The Rose
nearby_venues.student_review: Fitzroy pub crawl starts here. Good pub meals and a massive beer garden.

nearby_venues.name: Grub Food Van
nearby_venues.student_review: Brunch in a laneway garden. The shakshuka is legendary among students.

day_in_life.description: Start the day with a refreshing jog around Princes Park, just a stone's throw from campus. Breathe in the crisp morning air.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: A student jogging at sunrise through Princes Park, surrounded by green trees and morning mist

day_in_life.description: Fuel up with a flat white and avo toast at Seven Seeds, a popular student café tucked away in Carlton.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: A bustling café interior, with students sipping coffee and eating breakfast, sunlight streaming through large windows

day_in_life.description: Head to a thought-provoking Arts lecture in the historic Old Arts Building, a true testament to the university's rich history.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: A historic university lecture hall, filled with attentive students and an engaging lecturer

day_in_life.description: Enjoy a variety of lunch options at Union House. Today, it's all about the dumplings from the food court.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: A lively food court in Union House, students chatting and eating diverse meals at communal tables

day_in_life.activity: Study session in the Baillieu Library
day_in_life.description: Crack down on some assignments at the Baillieu Library, surrounded by an inspiring collection of books and resources.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: A student studying intently in a library, books and laptops on the table, shelves filled with books in the background

day_in_life.activity: Catch the tram to St Kilda
day_in_life.description: Hop on the iconic Melbourne tram for a quick ride to St Kilda Beach. Perfect way to unwind after a busy day.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: A colourful Melbourne tram traveling through the city, with students inside enjoying the ride and cityscapes

day_in_life.description: Enjoy a pay-as-you-feel dinner at Lentil As Anything in Abbotsford. Great food for a great cause with friends.
day_in_life.photo_prompt: A warm, inviting restaurant with communal tables, diverse dishes being served, and happy diners sharing meals

cost.tuition_comparison: Highest -- premium Go8, offset by Melbourne Model breadth
cost.rent_comparison: High -- inner Melbourne, offset by no car needed
